anchorregistry
  • Quickstart
  • View page source

Quickstart

Minimal working example. One anchor, live output.

These examples run against Sepolia testnet (network="sepolia"). To run against Base mainnet: replace configure(network="sepolia") with configure(network="base"). All function calls, record structures, and output shapes are identical across networks.

[1]:

# Cell 1 — setup
from anchorregistry import configure, get_by_arid

configure(network="sepolia", rpc_url="https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com")

[2]:

# Cell 2 — fetch a single anchor
record = get_by_arid("AR-2026-j1BgLvP")
record

[2]:

{'ar_id': 'AR-2026-j1BgLvP',
 'registered': True,
 'artifact_type_index': 1,
 'artifact_type_name': 'RESEARCH',
 'tx': '0xdadb0f57b8fa1f3c3324d06eceecd372d9e307133b2b22606be36bd666aac88f',
 'block': 10606566,
 'registrant': '0xc7a7afde1177fbf0bb265ea5a616d1b8d7ed8c44',
 'manifest_hash': '1183500c69149115de1508e5679877e505eaa6c056a299a5db8085c7f54514ee',
 'parent_ar_id': '',
 'descriptor': '',
 'title': 'test research',
 'author': '',
 'tree_id': '0x6b7bbb0c4a7a25a3b3fb6dd9b719e36292057adc8b9f411e15de0a1e90efa215',
 'token_commitment': '0x6b7bbb0c4a7a25a3b3fb6dd9b719e36292057adc8b9f411e15de0a1e90efa215',
 'data': {'doi': '',
  'institution': '',
  'co_authors': '',
  'url': 'https://arxiv.org/'}}

Every record has two levels:

  • Universal fields — ar_id, title, author, artifact_type_name, manifest_hash, registrant, tree_id, parent_ar_id, token_commitment, block, tx

  • Type-specific fields — nested under record["data"], keys depend on artifact_type_name

For RESEARCH records, data contains: doi, institution, co_authors, url.

[3]:

# Cell 3 — error handling
from anchorregistry import AnchorNotFoundError, ConfigurationError

try:
    get_by_arid("AR-0000-INVALID")
except AnchorNotFoundError as e:
    print(f"AnchorNotFoundError: {e}")

AnchorNotFoundError: AR-ID not found on-chain: AR-0000-INVALID
